This is a wdspec test.
[FAIL] test_accept[capabilities0-alert-None]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[FAIL] test_accept[capabilities0-confirm-True]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[FAIL] test_accept[capabilities0-prompt-]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[PASS] test_accept_and_notify[capabilities0-alert-None]
[PASS] test_accept_and_notify[capabilities0-confirm-True]
[PASS] test_accept_and_notify[capabilities0-prompt-]
[FAIL] test_dismiss[capabilities0-alert-None]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[FAIL] test_dismiss[capabilities0-confirm-False]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[FAIL] test_dismiss[capabilities0-prompt-None]
  assert (800, 600) != (800, 600)
[PASS] test_dismiss_and_notify[capabilities0-alert-None]
[PASS] test_dismiss_and_notify[capabilities0-confirm-False]
[PASS] test_dismiss_and_notify[capabilities0-prompt-None]
[PASS] test_ignore[capabilities0-alert]
[PASS] test_ignore[capabilities0-confirm]
[PASS] test_ignore[capabilities0-prompt]
[PASS] test_default[alert-None]
[PASS] test_default[confirm-False]
[PASS] test_default[prompt-None]
